package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_errors_wrap_in_tight_loop: Layer: Error handling cost. Flag repeated error wrapping inside loops where one aggregated context would be cheaper.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule530NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario530Negative(records []Rule530NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
